amendment.description: To establish a deficit-neutral reserve fund relating to grocery costs.

action.text: Amendment SA 4798 ruled out of order by the chair.

Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 4798, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 47 - 50. Record Vote Number: 90.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 305(b)(2) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 4798.
Amendment SA 4798 proposed by Senator Lujan.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4798 proposed by Senator Lujan.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 4798, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 47 - 50. Record Vote Number: 90.
